responses.response: Doxin (generic: Doxycycline) is an antibiotic prescribed to treat various bacterial infections. Based on my records, it is used for:

bullets.description: Typically have symptoms such as Sore throat, extreme tiredness, chest pain, low-grade fever, mild chills, cough, sneezing, headache
Typically have symptoms such as needing to pee often, pain while peeing and pain in your side or lower back
